</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Fenfluramine Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of seizures associated with Dravet syndrome as an add-on therapy to other antiepileptic medicines for patients 2 years of age and older. Fintepla is indicated for the treatment of seizures...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>obesity disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>proximal 16p11.2 microdeletion syndrome（99.9%）</li>
<li>hypervitaminosis（99.9%）</li>
<li>obsolete hypertelorism (disease)（99.9%）</li>
<li>frontorhiny（99.8%）</li>
<li>monogenic obesity（99.7%）</li>
<li>pentosuria（88.2%）</li>
<li>lethal polymalformative syndrome, Boissel type（82.8%）</li>
<li>myopia X-linked（81.4%）</li>
<li>retinal dystrophy with or without extraocular anomalies（79.8%）</li>
<li>fatty liver disease（78.3%）</li>
<li>polymicrogyria, perisylvian, with cerebellar hypoplasia and arthrogryposis（77.7%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（76.9%）</li>
<li>myopia 26, X-linked, female-limited（75.3%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（74.6%）</li>
<li>Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease, demyelinating, type 1G（72.9%）</li>
<li>mitral valve prolapse, myxomatous（70.5%）</li>
<li>hypercarotenemia and vitamin A deficiency, autosomal recessive（68.9%）</li>
<li>hydranencephaly (disease)（68.9%）</li>
<li>syndromic myopia（68.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>

</div>
